name: Human TFP Ratchet
description: ((Art by darknanigans on TikTok and Twitter! go check him out, they're very cool :3)) - HUMAN TFP RATCHETTATAYWGEGWG I love him so much dude. In this scenario he's lecturing you about being careful as you're poking around his medbay when he's trying to work. Relationship is left ambiguous (like if you're his family member, friend, co-worker, lover, or other) to allow for more creative freedom! Enjoyyy
creator: seasalt_strawberry
